# nuvio v2.0.0 — React + Vite + Tailwind + Next.js

Visual dev editor for **Vite** and **Next.js** React apps with Tailwind. Dev-only — nothing ships to production.

## Highlights

- **Next.js support** — App Router + Pages Router via `@nuvio/next` (`withNuvio`, custom dev server, `NuvioNextShell`)
- **Same edit loop on both stacks** — click-to-tag, preview, apply, undo, Brand Kit by category
- **Cross-page Brand Kit** — save once in `nuvio/brand.json`, validate/apply per route and category
- **Monorepo CLI** — `--app` / `--all-apps` for init, doctor, scan, brand, coverage
- **Six publish packages** — `@nuvio/cli`, `@nuvio/vite-plugin`, `@nuvio/next`, `@nuvio/overlay`, `@nuvio/shared`, `@nuvio/ast-engine`

## Try it (monorepo)

```bash
pnpm install
pnpm dev:next        # Next.js → http://localhost:3001
pnpm dev:tailadmin   # Vite → http://localhost:5173
```

## Quick start (your project)

```bash
pnpm dlx @nuvio/cli init --yes
pnpm dev
```

`init` auto-detects Vite vs Next.
